compiled_state.title: RED: Test debug-everything bug-fix mode skips diagnostic/triage when open bugs exist
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write a bash test file that verifies debug-everything SKILL.md contains a bug-fix mode entry path that skips diagnostic/triage when open bug tickets exist.

**File**: `tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh`

**Test approach**: Structural metadata validation of debug-everything SKILL.md. Each test uses direct grep/python3 pattern matching against the SKILL.md content.

**5 test functions**:
1. `test_orchestration_flow_has_bug_fix_branch` — The orchestration flow diagram includes a conditional branch for open bugs routing to bug-fix mode. RED: current flow has no such branch.
2. `test_bug_detection_step_exists` — SKILL.md documents a step checking for open bug tickets before diagnostic scan. RED: no such step exists.
3. `test_bug_fix_mode_skips_diagnostic` — Bug-fix mode explicitly states diagnostic scan is skipped. RED: no bug-fix mode exists.
4. `test_bug_fix_mode_skips_triage` — Bug-fix mode states triage sub-agent dispatch is skipped. RED: no bug-fix mode exists.
5. `test_orchestrator_level_fix_bug_invocation` — Bug-fix mode invokes fix-bug at orchestrator level (reads SKILL.md inline), NOT via Task tool. Scope test to the bug-fix mode section only (not the whole file, since Phase 5 legitimately uses Task tool dispatch). RED: no bug-fix mode exists.

**Structural test exemption**: SKILL.md is a prompt file with no executable behavior. These are metadata/schema validation tests.

**IMPORTANT**: Also register this test file in `.test-index` on line 86 (debug-everything/SKILL.md entry) by appending `,tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh` to the end of the existing comma-separated list.

**Fuzzy match**: source `debugeverything` → test `testdebugeverythingbugfixmode` — contains `debugeverything` ✓

### Files to modify
- CREATE: `tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh`
- EDIT: `.test-index` (append new test to debug-everything/SKILL.md entry, line 86)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh
- [ ] At least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_\|--- test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated for debug-everything/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep 'debug-everything/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh'

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for bug-fix mode — 5 test functions, all RED, marker set.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
